name: Artichokes & Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and trim the artichokes and beans.
2. Bring a large kettle of water to a boil and cook the artichokes until tender (about 15 minutes).
3. Add the green beans to the boiling water and cook for an additional 3 to 4 minutes. Drain and keep warm.
4. In a separate pan, sauté garlic in walnut oil for 1 minute.
5. Add the bell pepper and cook for another minute.
6. Mix all ingredients together and serve.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE; CAL: 124; CHO: 0mg; CAR: 20g; PRO: 4g; SOD: 6mg; FAT: 4g;
Source: Light & Easy Diabetes Cuisine by Betty Marks (Brought to you and yours via Nancy O'Brion and her Meal-Master)
